expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: The result explicitly frames the benchmark focus as preserving "Google Sheets export entry points", "Scope boundaries", and "Format constraints" "before any scenario drafting" and provides a dedicated intake checklist: "A) Google Sheets export entry points", "B) Scope boundaries", and "C) Format constraints". It also reiterates Phase 1 should not draft scenarios: "Therefore... the “pass” condition is whether Phase 1 intake would carry forward the critical context items... *not* by drafting scenarios."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly scoped to Phase 1 and describes the Phase 1 contract as "spawn-only" with expected output "phase1_spawn_manifest.json", and states it stayed within phase 1: execution_notes.md says "Stayed within Phase 1 scope (spawn/evidence routing; no scenario drafting)." result.md also avoids scenario drafting and evaluates Phase 1 via spawn/manifest acceptance criteria.
